seriess.title: Large Bank Consumer Credit Card Balances: 60 or More Days Past Due Rates: Accounts Based
seriess.notes: The share of all credit card accounts that are 60 or more days past due. For more detail see: methodology (https://sc103-philfed-prod-cm.sitecore-prod-ase4.appserviceenvironment.net/surveys-and-data/y14-methodology).
